Package neqsim.process.chemistry.scale

Class ScaleControlAssessor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.scale.ScaleControlAssessor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class ScaleControlAssessor extends Object implements Serializable
Combines a ScalePredictionCalculator with one or more ScaleInhibitorPerformance models to estimate the residual scaling risk after chemical treatment.

The inhibitor reduces the effective supersaturation seen by the system. The residual saturation index after treatment is approximated as: 

 
 SI_inhibited = SI_uninhibited + log10(1 - efficiency)

If efficiency = 0 the residual SI equals the uninhibited SI; if efficiency = 1 the residual SI approaches negative infinity (no scale). The model assumes the inhibitor acts on nucleation / growth kinetics, not on thermodynamic equilibrium — so this is a screening-level risk metric.

Pattern: build with the prediction calculator, register inhibitors per scale type, call evaluate(), then read residual SIs and the verdict via toMap().

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Description
    void
    addInhibitor(ScaleInhibitorPerformance.ScaleType scaleType, ScaleInhibitorPerformance inhibitor)
    Registers an inhibitor for a specific scale type.
    void
    evaluate()
    Runs the predictor (if needed), evaluates each inhibitor, and computes residual SI per scale.
    static ScaleControlAssessor
    fromStream(StreamInterface stream)
    Convenience factory: builds a ScalePredictionCalculator pre-loaded with operating conditions and aqueous-phase concentrations from the given stream, then wraps it in a fresh ScaleControlAssessor.
    double
    getResidualSI(ScaleInhibitorPerformance.ScaleType scaleType)
    Returns the residual SI for the supplied scale.
    List<Map<String,Object>>

    Returns the industry standards applied by the scale-control assessor.
    double

    Returns the worst residual SI among all evaluated scales.
    boolean
    isControlled(double threshold)
    Returns whether the worst residual SI is below the supplied scaling threshold.
    boolean
    isEvaluated()
    Returns whether evaluate() has been run.

    toMap()
    Returns a structured map for JSON serialisation.

  • Constructor Details

    • ScaleControlAssessor

      public ScaleControlAssessor(ScalePredictionCalculator predictor)
      Wraps an existing scale prediction calculator.
      Parameters:
      predictor - the calculator (must be calculate()-ready or already calculated)

  • Method Details

    • fromStream

      public static ScaleControlAssessor fromStream(StreamInterface stream)
      Convenience factory: builds a ScalePredictionCalculator pre-loaded with operating conditions and aqueous-phase concentrations from the given stream, then wraps it in a fresh ScaleControlAssessor.
      Parameters:
      stream - produced fluid stream
      Returns:
      assessor with predictor initialised from the stream

    • addInhibitor

      public void addInhibitor(ScaleInhibitorPerformance.ScaleType scaleType, ScaleInhibitorPerformance inhibitor)
      Registers an inhibitor for a specific scale type.
      Parameters:
      scaleType - target scale
      inhibitor - configured performance model

    • evaluate

      public void evaluate()
      Runs the predictor (if needed), evaluates each inhibitor, and computes residual SI per scale.

    • getResidualSI

      public double getResidualSI(ScaleInhibitorPerformance.ScaleType scaleType)
      Returns the residual SI for the supplied scale.
      Parameters:
      scaleType - scale type
      Returns:
      residual SI (NaN if not applicable)

    • getWorstResidualSI

      public double getWorstResidualSI()
      Returns the worst residual SI among all evaluated scales.
      Returns:
      worst SI (most positive)

    • isControlled

      public boolean isControlled(double threshold)
      Returns whether the worst residual SI is below the supplied scaling threshold.
      Parameters:
      threshold - scaling SI threshold (e.g. 0.5)
      Returns:
      true if all scales are controlled

    • isEvaluated

      public boolean isEvaluated()
      Returns whether evaluate() has been run.
      Returns:
      true if evaluated

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Returns a structured map for JSON serialisation.
      Returns:
      ordered map

    • getStandardsApplied

      public List<Map<String,Object>> getStandardsApplied()
      Returns the industry standards applied by the scale-control assessor.
      Returns:
      list of standards (each as an ordered map)
